(container_memory_rss + container_memory: (container_memory_rss + container_memory_cache + container_memory_swap + kernel memory) / (memory limit); no data means the container has no mem limit configured
5分钟内apiserver的请求数统计: Apiserver request count in the last 5 minutes
CPU 使用量除以 CPU 请求量。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 CPU: CPU usage divided by CPU request. If there is no data, check whether the container has a CPU Request configured.
CPU 使用量除以 CPU 限制量。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 CPU: CPU usage divided by CPU limit. If there is no data, check whether the container has a CPU Limit configured.
Deployment Pod 可用性不足70%（replica超过9个pod）: Deployment Pod availability below 70% (replicas above 9 pods)
Deployment 历史更新保留版本的数量: Number of revision history versions retained by the Deployment
RSS + 部分活跃的 page cache（不能立即回收）， 更应该关注此指标: RSS + part of the active page cache (cannot be reclaimed immediately); this is the metric to focus on
apiserver工作队列深度，越接近0越好: Apiserver work queue depth; the closer to 0 the better
apiserver的5xx 错误率(5xx请求数/总请求数): Apiserver 5xx error rate (5xx requests / total requests)
apiserver的5xx错误率，按请求动作分类统计: Apiserver 5xx error rate by request verb
apiserver的响应延迟，按请求动作分类统计: Apiserver response latency by request verb
apiserver的实例健康状态，0表示down，1表示up: Apiserver instance health status; 0 means down, 1 means up
controller manager 90分位 任务出队到完成的耗时: Controller manager P90 duration from work item dequeue to completion
controller manager 90分位请求apiserver延迟，按请求: Controller manager P90 apiserver request latency by request type
controller manager zone中的node数据: Controller manager Node count per zone
controller manager 任务进入队列的重试次数: Controller manager work item enqueue retries
controller manager 请求量 按返回码统计: Controller manager request count by response code
controller manager90分位请求延迟，按url统计: Controller manager P90 request latency by URL
controller manager90分位请求延迟，按实例统计: Controller manager P90 request latency by instance
controller manager请求5xx，按请求类型统计: Controller manager 5xx requests by request type
controller manager请求量，按请求类型统计: Controller manager request count by request type
coredns 请求量 按返回码统计: CoreDNS request count by response code
coredns 请求量，按请求类型统计: CoreDNS request count by request type
etcd 处理的请求数，按响应码统计: etcd handled request count by response code
etcd处理的请求数， 按实例统计: etcd handled request count by instance
etcd处理的请求数，按请求类型统计: etcd handled request count by request type
etcd读取索引失败 读取索引慢（过期索引或者超时）次数: etcd read index failure and slow read index count (stale index or timeout)
pod进入调度队列的平均速率: Average rate of Pods entering the scheduling queue
scheduler 90分位请求延迟，按实例统计: Scheduler P90 request latency by instance
scheduler 90分位请求延迟，按请求类型统计: Scheduler P90 request latency by request type
scheduler 请求量 按返回码统计: Scheduler request count by response code
scheduler请求量，按请求类型统计: Scheduler request count by request type
主机 inode 将在 24 小时内填满 (instance {{ $label: Host inodes will fill up within 24 hours (instance {{ $labels.instance }})
主机磁盘将在 24 小时内填满: Host disk will fill up within 24 hours
主机磁盘将在 24 小时内填满 (instance {{ $labels.ins: Host disk will fill up within 24 hours (instance {{ $labels.instance }})
任务在队列中的90分位等待耗时: P90 time work items spend waiting in the queue
兼容阿里ACK和categraf采集的指标: Compatible with metrics collected by Alibaba ACK and Categraf
内存使用量除以内存请求量。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 Memory R: Memory usage divided by memory request. If there is no data, check whether the container has a Memory Request configured.
内存使用量除以内存限制量。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进行了 Memory L: Memory usage divided by memory limit. If there is no data, check whether the container has a Memory Limit configured.
实际“工作集内存”，即真正被频繁访问、内核不愿回收的内存，OOM 风险监控: The actual working set memory, i.e. memory that is frequently accessed and that the kernel is reluctant to reclaim; used to monitor OOM risk
容器 CPU 使用量相对于限制量/请求量的比例。若没有数据需要检查相应容器是否进: Container CPU usage as a ratio of its limit/request. If there is no data, check whether the container has a CPU Limit/Request configured.
容器 WorkingSet 内存使用量相对于限制量/请求量的比例。若没有数据需要: Container WorkingSet memory usage as a ratio of its limit/request. If there is no data, check whether the container has a Memory Limit/Request configured.
容器1min CPU平均使用率，如果pod内有多个容器，会分别显示各个容器CPU: Average container CPU usage over 1 min. If a Pod has multiple containers, the CPU usage of each container is shown separately (the pause container is hidden by default). If a container is configured with 4 cores, 100% usage means all 4 cores are fully used; if it is configured with 2 cores, 100% usage means all 2 cores are fully used. If the container has no cpu limit configured, this value is not shown.

Average container CPU usage over 1 min. If a Pod has multiple containers, the CPU usage of each container is shown separately (the pause container is hidden by default). If a container is configured with 4 cores, 400% usage means all 4 cores are fully used; if it is configured with 2 cores, 200% usage means all 2 cores are fully used.
容器1min 内核态CPU平均使用率，如果pod内有多个容器，会分别显示各个容器: Average container system-mode CPU usage over 1 min. If a Pod has multiple containers, the system-mode CPU usage of each container is shown separately (the pause container is hidden by default). If a container is configured with 4 cores, 400% usage means all 4 cores are fully used in system mode; if it is configured with 2 cores, 200% usage means all 2 cores are fully used in system mode.

Average container system-mode CPU usage over 1 min. If a Pod has multiple containers, the user-mode CPU usage of each container is shown separately (the pause container is hidden by default). If a container is configured with 4 cores, 400% usage means all 4 cores are fully used in user mode; if it is configured with 2 cores, 200% usage means all 2 cores are fully used in user mode.
容器CPU Limit，2代表容器CPU Limit为2核， 0.2代表容器CP: Container CPU Limit; 2 means the container CPU Limit is 2 cores, 0.2 means 0.2 cores, and no data means no Limit is set
容器RSS内存占用大小，最能反映应用的“真实内存使用”\n1. 通常用于排查内存:
Container RSS memory footprint, which best reflects the real memory usage of an application
1. Commonly used to troubleshoot memory leaks (continuously growing RSS usually indicates a leak)
2. It is the part that the OS cannot easily reclaim
容器内存Limit配置，0表示没有设置内存 Limit: Container memory Limit configuration; 0 means no memory Limit is set
容器可写层（Writable Layer）的磁盘配额大小: Disk quota size of the container Writable Layer
容器在所有 CFS period 中，被限流的比例（百分比）\n1.0% 表示：:
The percentage of all CFS periods in which the container was throttled
1.0% means 1 out of every 100 periods was throttled
容器已使用的文件系统大小: Filesystem size used by the container
容器网络发送的字节数（1 分钟内）: Bytes sent by the container network (last 1 minute)
容器网络接收的字节数（1 分钟内）: Bytes received by the container network (last 1 minute)
展示该工作负载每个 Pod 的 CPU 使用量。: Shows the CPU usage of each Pod in this workload.
展示该工作负载的每个 Pod 内存使用量。: Shows the memory usage of each Pod in this workload.
当前并发请求apiserver的数量: Current number of concurrent apiserver requests
当前版本apiserver使用，未来版本中要移除的资源: Resources used by the current apiserver version that will be removed in future versions
按照请求动作分类统计apiserver的请求数: Apiserver request count by request verb
按照返回码分类统计apiserver请求数: Apiserver request count by response code
文件系统inode将在24小时内填满: Filesystem inodes will fill up within 24 hours
有其他云主机窃取cpu: CPU stolen by other cloud guests
查看每个容器使用的cpu核数: View the CPU cores used by each container
没有配额的情况下默认值是0: The default value is 0 when no quota is set
用户级 CPU 使用率相对于整体 CPU 使用量的比例。: User-level CPU usage as a ratio of overall CPU usage.
用户级 CPU 消耗占整体 CPU 消耗量的比例: Ratio of user-level CPU consumption to overall CPU consumption
节点磁盘快满了-S1-inodes-20: Node disk almost full - S1 - inodes - 20
节点磁盘快满了-S1-inodes-3: Node disk almost full - S1 - inodes - 3
节点磁盘快满了-S1-space-3: Node disk almost full - S1 - space - 3
节点磁盘快满了-S2-inodes-40: Node disk almost full - S2 - inodes - 40
节点磁盘快满了-S2-inodes-5: Node disk almost full - S2 - inodes - 5
节点磁盘快满了-S2-space-5: Node disk almost full - S2 - space - 5
该值大于0，说明CPU在运行期间发生throttle情况，即容器设置的CPU规格: A value greater than 0 means CPU throttling occurred at runtime, i.e. the CPU spec configured for the container does not meet its actual CPU demand. In this case you usually need to raise the container CPU spec, or optimize the program to reduce CPU cost.
请确认Pod Yaml中设置了resources.limits: Make sure resources.limits is set in the Pod YAML
调度器cache中pod node和已绑定pod的数量: Number of Pods, Nodes and bound Pods in the scheduler cache
调度器驱逐容器的次数: Number of containers evicted by the scheduler
调度插件在每个扩展点的执行时间,90分位: P90 execution time of scheduler plugins at each extension point
调度算法+绑定 90分位耗时: P90 duration of scheduling algorithm plus binding
调度队列中pending pod的数目: Number of pending Pods in the scheduling queue
队列中最耗时任务的处理时间（500ms采样周期，未完成的任务-任务开始处理即出队: Processing time of the longest-running work item in the queue (500ms sampling period, unfinished items, timed from the moment the item is dequeued and starts processing)
